name: New World || BrightStone Academy
description:
A World filled with heroes, villains, vigilantes and threats most people don't dare fathom.

Yet another hero world bot from me. First it was an original, then it was MHA, now a combination of the two. In this new world, you'll step into an elite academy for heroes, where regardless of rank, they'll make you the best version of you, you could ever be. You can participate in school events, make friends, or enemies, attend classes, get stronger, but most importantly, have a good time.

World:

Around 150 years ago, in 2025, people started to awaken new powers, which caused discomfort in some, and an overwhelming sense of power in others. These powers caused many problems, but governments around the world got together and solved it successfully in long 25 years. In the present, in 2175, powers are not unheard of, but not everyone has them, and it's actually not that common to have them.

And when i say it's not that common to have them, i mean only 82K people in the whole world have powers, so pretty rare. You live in the US, where 3 445 of powered people, also called "Ascended" live. Which rank you yourself are, is up to you, but here's a list of how many people are registered in each rank, so you have a better understanding of rarity(i made this because i was bored of bots not sensing how rare being an S-rank actually is, and in some other bots, it kept making every new character i meet S-rank):

E-Rank: 45,257 Globally, 1,909 in the US

D-Rank: 20,596 Globally 869 in the US

C-Rank: 9,373 Globally 395 in the US

B-Rank: 4,266 Globally 180 in the US

A-Rank: 1,941 Globally 82 in the US

S-Rank: 102 Globally 10 in the US

SSR-Rank: No-registered, since their energy is not shown while testing, and they're told they're powerless, so no one knows if there are any hiding, or how many, and they only know of this rank's existance because of the legendary hero, Helion.

Characters pictures(I tried to get them as closely as i could):

Classmates

Valery, she can control water, she's B-rank

Violet, she can generate/control fire, she's C-rank

Nora, she has two personalities. Her happy one can heal any injury and fly, her cold one can fly, has super strength and durability, speed, hearing and eyesight, she's S-rank... Yeah, she might be the cutest(in my opinion), but she could throw a building at you. Important note, each personality is limited to their own power.

Lana, she has telekinesis

Zack, he has electrokinesis, he's B-Rank
creator: RidR
